overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban street. The player character walks past holographic advertisements and pedestrians, crosses a busy intersection, and approaches a building entrance labeled 'Ellison' while vehicles pass by on the wet roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cyberpunk sidewalk with neon advertisements

events.description: black sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk next to a large red neon billboard

notable_agents.action: two women in red and black outfits walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical red billboard with cyan Japanese text reading 妄想アイドル and Your Fantasy Idol in English
green and yellow metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
tall pole-mounted street lights illuminating the foggy atmosphere
scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, dominated by a large red neon billboard with Japanese text. The camera walks forward past two women walking ahead, while a black car passes on the right. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and red neon lights from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with large vertical advertisement tower

events.description: passing the red billboard, entering area dominated by vertical advertisement tower
yellow sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past a large vertical digital billboard displaying SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the camera
shirtless pedestrian with tattoos walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall digital billboard structure displaying SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2 with a character image

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier section of sidewalk dominated by a tall vertical advertisement tower for SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2. The camera encounters more pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, including a person in a white jacket and a shirtless tattooed individual. A yellow sports car speeds past on the right as the fog continues to obscure the distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with traffic lights and overhead lighting

events.description: leaving the sidewalk and approaching the intersection crosswalk
traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrian crossing
beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection crosswalk while vehicles wait at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: blue sedan waiting at the red light before driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights showing red then green
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
long horizontal light fixture suspended over the intersection illuminating the fog
large building facade with illuminated entrance visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the enclosed sidewalk into a wide intersection, approaching a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes. Overhead floodlights cut through the dense fog. The traffic light changes from red to green, and the camera begins crossing the street as a blue sedan waits at the light. The Ellison building becomes visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance approach with neon signage and debris

events.description: completing the street crossing and approaching the Ellison building entrance
slowing approach as reaching the entrance of the Ellison building

agents.ego_description: crossing the remaining street distance and walking toward the entrance of the Ellison building

entered.detail: large building entrance with illuminated red ELLISON sign above the doorway
same red billboard from the beginning now visible from the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the Ellison building entrance, with the red neon billboard from the start of the video reappearing on the left from a new angle. The camera crosses the remaining distance of the intersection, leaving the crosswalk stripes behind, and walks toward the illuminated entrance with the red ELLISON sign glowing above the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy, neon-drenched urban corridor that gradually opens from a crowded sidewalk into a wide city intersection. It begins on a wet pavement reflecting cyan and red lights, moving past pedestrians and a black car beneath a massive red neon billboard. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more congested, passing a towering advertisement for Sweet Clean Speed 2 and a shirtless tattooed man while a yellow sports car streaks past. The scene then expands as the camera leaves the enclosed sidewalk to enter a wide intersection, where overhead floodlights pierce the haze and a blue sedan waits as the traffic light turns green. Finally, the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and moves through the remaining fog toward the glowing red sign of the Ellison building entrance.
